case_title: SAM RAITER VS. TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JOHN E. MORRO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-16-2008 AT 8:30AM.
CERT. MAIL FOR JOHN MORRO RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAITER, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED BY KEITH WILSON) SERVED APR-19-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, KEITH R.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO TRIBECCA PROPERTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-16-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. KEITH WILSON PRESENT ON BEHALF OF TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC AND WAIVES SERVICE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESET. DEFENDANT TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN MORRO NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAITER, SAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC WILSON, KEITH R. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $657.75 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,767.75, DEFENDANT JOHN MORRO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY RAITER, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT TRIBECCA PROPERTIES, LLC WILSON, KEITH R. MORRO, JOHN E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
